SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 EventViewModel

java.lang.Object
androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
com.example.syntaxappproject.EventViewModel
public class EventViewModel extends androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
Shared ViewModel for the event creation flow.

This ViewModel acts as a central data store for the multi-step event creation process. It allows the three event creation fragments (

引用无效 
ui.CreateEventFragment
,
引用无效 
ui.CreateEventUploadPosterFragment
, and
引用无效 
ui.CreateEventQRFragment
) to share event data across navigation steps without losing state.

Data persists across fragment transitions and configuration changes (such as screen rotation) until the event is successfully created and the user navigates away.

The ViewModel stores all event-related data including:

  • Basic event information (name, description, location, capacity)
  • Date information (event dates, registration period dates)
  • Lottery criteria and geolocation requirements
  • Media references (poster image URI, QR code data)
  • Private event settings and invited user IDs

All fields are exposed as LiveData to allow fragments to observe changes and react accordingly, while setters use MutableLiveData.setValue(Object) to update the data.

另请参阅:
  • ViewModel
  • 引用无效 
    ui.CreateEventFragment
  • 引用无效 
    ui.CreateEventUploadPosterFragment
  • 引用无效 
    ui.CreateEventQRFragment

    Returns the maximum waitlist capacity.

    Returns the detailed description of the event.

    Returns the event end date.

    Returns the registration period end date.

    Returns the Firestore document ID of the event being created.
    androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<Double>
    getEventLatitude()
    Returns the geographic latitude of the event location.

    Returns the geographic longitude of the event location.

    getGeoReq()
    Returns whether geolocation is required for this event.

    Returns the URI of the selected event poster image.

    getInvitedUserIds()
    Returns the list of user IDs invited to this private event.

    Returns the physical location/address of the event.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getEventId

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getEventId()
      Returns the Firestore document ID of the event being created.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the event ID

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String id)
      Sets the Firestore document ID of the event being created.
      参数:
      id - the Firestore document ID

    • getName

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getName()
      Returns the name/title of the event.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the event name

    • setName

      public void setName(String n)
      Sets the name/title of the event.
      参数:
      n - the event name

    • getDescription

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getDescription()
      Returns the detailed description of the event.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the event description

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String d)
      Sets the detailed description of the event.
      参数:
      d - the event description

    • getLocation

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getLocation()
      Returns the physical location/address of the event.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the event location

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String loc)
      Sets the physical location/address of the event.
      参数:
      loc - the event location (city name or address)

    • getLotteryCriteria

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getLotteryCriteria()
      Returns the lottery criteria text.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the lottery criteria

    • setLotteryCriteria

      public void setLotteryCriteria(String criteria)
      Sets the lottery criteria text.
      参数:
      criteria - the lottery criteria (user-defined requirements)

    • getCapacity

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<Integer> getCapacity()
      Returns the maximum waitlist capacity.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the capacity

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(int i)
      Sets the maximum waitlist capacity.
      参数:
      i - the capacity value (number of entrants allowed)

    • getGeoReq

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<Boolean> getGeoReq()
      Returns whether geolocation is required for this event.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the geolocation requirement flag

    • setGeoReq

      public void setGeoReq(Boolean geo)
      Sets whether geolocation is required for this event.
      参数:
      geo - true if users must be within 50km of event location to join

    • getEventLatitude

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<Double> getEventLatitude()
      Returns the geographic latitude of the event location.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the event latitude

    • setEventLatitude

      public void setEventLatitude(Double lat)
      Sets the geographic latitude of the event location.
      参数:
      lat - the latitude coordinate (used for distance validation)

    • getEventLongitude

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<Double> getEventLongitude()
      Returns the geographic longitude of the event location.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the event longitude

    • setEventLongitude

      public void setEventLongitude(Double lng)
      Sets the geographic longitude of the event location.
      参数:
      lng - the longitude coordinate (used for distance validation)

    • getStartingEventDate

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getStartingEventDate()
      Returns the event start date.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the start date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

    • setStartingEventDate

      public void setStartingEventDate(String date)
      Sets the event start date.
      参数:
      date - the start date in YYYY-MM-DD format

    • getEndingEventDate

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getEndingEventDate()
      Returns the event end date.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the end date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

    • setEndingEventDate

      public void setEndingEventDate(String date)
      Sets the event end date.
      参数:
      date - the end date in YYYY-MM-DD format

    • getStartingRegistrationPeriod

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getStartingRegistrationPeriod()
      Returns the registration period start date.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the registration start date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

    • setStartingRegistrationPeriod

      public void setStartingRegistrationPeriod(String date)
      Sets the registration period start date.
      参数:
      date - the registration start date in YYYY-MM-DD format

    • getEndingRegistrationPeriod

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getEndingRegistrationPeriod()
      Returns the registration period end date.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the registration end date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

    • setEndingRegistrationPeriod

      public void setEndingRegistrationPeriod(String date)
      Sets the registration period end date.
      参数:
      date - the registration end date in YYYY-MM-DD format

    • getImageUri

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<android.net.Uri> getImageUri()
      Returns the URI of the selected event poster image.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the image URI (local file reference)

    • setImageUri

      public void setImageUri(android.net.Uri uri)
      Sets the URI of the selected event poster image.
      参数:
      uri - the local URI of the selected image

    • getQrCodeData

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<String> getQrCodeData()
      Returns the Base64-encoded QR code data.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the QR code data string

    • setQrCodeData

      public void setQrCodeData(String qr)
      Sets the Base64-encoded QR code data.
      参数:
      qr - the Base64-encoded QR code string

    • getPrivateEvent

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<Boolean> getPrivateEvent()
      Returns whether this is a private event.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the private event flag

    • setPrivateEvent

      public void setPrivateEvent(Boolean value)
      Sets whether this is a private event.

      Private events are not visible in public event listings and require invitations to join the waiting list.

      参数:
      value - true for private event, false for public event

    • getInvitedUserIds

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<ArrayList<String>> getInvitedUserIds()
      Returns the list of user IDs invited to this private event.
      返回:
      LiveData containing the list of invited user IDs

    • setInvitedUserIds

      public void setInvitedUserIds(ArrayList<String> ids)
      Sets the list of user IDs invited to this private event.
      参数:
      ids - the list of user IDs to invite
